title: Indian Army – CSBO – 190 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Indian Army CSBO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 190 Civilian Switch Board Operator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Army Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 190 vacancies for Civilian Switch Board Operator posts. Candidates can apply online only from 02.05.2026 to 31.05.2026 through Indian Army website indianarmy.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Up to 40 years (45 years for SC/ST candidates)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only - via official email ID: [email protected] (PDF application form submitted as email attachment)

qualification.education_qualification: Candidate will be disqualified if found to have contracted a marriage while having a living spouse, or entered into another marriage

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 21,700/- + allowances (Level-3, Cell-1 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix)

selection_process: Written Test (100 marks) + Practical Test (Qualifying) + Interview (Qualifying) + Medical Test
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official email ID [email protected]. Hard copy applications sent by post will not be accepted. The application window is open from 02-05-2026 (0001 Hrs) to 31-05-2026 (2359 Hrs). Candidates must open the PDF application form in Adobe Acrobat Reader ONLY - do NOT open in browser (Chrome/Edge) as fields may not work. All fields marked with * are mandatory and must not be left blank. All text must be typed in BLOCK LETTERS (CAPITALS).
